_comment: Each collaborator adds this to their own MCP client config (e.g. Claude Desktop's claude_desktop_config.json). AGENTSYNC_AGENT_ID must be unique per person; AGENTSYNC_REPO points at that person's own local clone of the shared repo.

env._optional: defaults shown below; omit unless you need to change them
env._provision: only used by provision() when bootstrapping a brand-new repo; the partner you'll invite as a collaborator
